name: Septerna, Inc.
business: Septerna is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing oral small molecule drugs targeting GPCRs using its proprietary Native Complex Platform, initially focusing on endocrinology, immunology and inflammation, and metabolic diseases.
sellsTo: Patients with immunology and inflammation diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering a new era of GPCR oral small molecule drug discovered powered by our proprietary Native Complex Platform.
